title: Simple Hydration
description: Adds a basic thirst bar to the HUD.
body:
This datapack adds hydration into the game in the form of a very simple thirst bar.

![Image of Thirst Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UArwG7u6/images/b139c66550a2737c35bfb49e00366d676ea47bb3.png)

How it works:

Jumping, sprinting, swimming and walking all use decrease your hydration (by different amounts) while eating foods such as stews and fruits, or drinking water will fill it up.

Your thirst bar goes down at different speeds depending on where you are. It depletes faster in warm biomes, or the nether and takes longer in cooler biomes.

Leave a comment on [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/simple-hydration/)!

Note: This datapack uses a resourcepack to show the thirst bar. The resource pack is required, without it enabled you will not see your hydration level (does not apply to mod version)
